narrative:
Pike County has 17,033 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.3%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.9% of registrants.
